task: Track B: teach the generator to LEARN for FREE from falsification survivors (close the learn->generate loop without Lean). Honesty: survived != proven.
status: DONE — PS mirror green (50/50, 8/8 core), regressions green, NOT deployed (branch pushed; Muhammad merges + deploys).
open_question_resolved: YES — survivor records ALREADY carry the structural tag, so ZERO LLM and schema-free. Verified against LIVE Supabase (BOLT project): survivor rows carry metadata.m3_template (the template id the generator stamps), metadata.tested_to (the bound N), and metadata.m3_generated=true. No tagging at generation time was needed; no per-survivor LLM call on the hot path.
aggregation_source_decision: Aggregated from m8_research_notes, NOT m8_graph_nodes. The brief assumed survivors live in m8_graph_nodes (status tested_to_<N>). Live data corrected that: m8_graph_nodes has only 2 survivor nodes (template B_res_total_gap) because the nightly loop's graph-mirror (persistNote->ingestNote, gated on GRAPH_DISABLED) was historically off, while EVERY survivor is durably persisted to m8_research_notes (persistNote always writes there). m8_research_notes holds the real history: 7 templates, ~78 distinct surviving statements. Both stores carry the SAME metadata.m3_template, so the choice is honest and future-proof; the aggregator also accepts graph-node shape (status tested_to_<N> + content/label), so it keeps working if/when graph mirroring is re-enabled. count = DISTINCT statements per template (deduped on normalized content), mirroring the graph's (kind,norm_label) dedup — so 'count' is genuine structural productivity, not persistence frequency.
what_it_does: 1) New FREE learning lane in lib/conjecture-memory.js: reads existing survivors, aggregates by structural template, gates by productivity, and formats a SEPARATE computational-evidence PREFER block. Pure fns: survivorMinCount, parseTestedToBound, aggregateSurvivorsByTemplate (distinct-statement dedup + maxBound + rank), gateSurvivorTemplates (>=N distinct, cap 5), buildSurvivorBlock (evidence-not-proof wording, '' on empty). Fail-safe DB reader: getSurvivorTemplateStats (reads m8_research_notes, kind=conjecture + m3_generated, limit SURVIVOR_WINDOW=1000, [] on any error).

2) lib/conjecture-gen.js runConjectureGenWithFeedback now reads survivor stats and PREPENDS the evidence block. Final packet order: VERIFIED (Lean-proven, B112) / COMPUTATIONAL EVIDENCE (survivors, B113) / AVOID (B99) / <packet>. The evidence block sits BELOW the proven block and ABOVE avoid, with its own evidence-not-proof framing — kept strictly separate from the Lean-proven buildFeedbackBlock. Returns survivorTemplates; early-return (no creds / GRAPH_DISABLED) carries survivorTemplates: [].

3) lib/loop.js runObservePhase stamps survivor telemetry into the EXISTING m8_loop_runs.metadata.learn JSONB: survivor_templates (count earning the gate), survivor_min_count, survivor_template_tags (the template list). Build-112's earned_patterns telemetry untouched. NO schema change.
honesty_invariants_held: survived != proven, end to end. buildSurvivorBlock header literally says 'EMPIRICAL evidence ... NOT proof: survived != proven' and 'NEVER call a survivor proven, established, true, or likely true'. Each bullet is tagged '(computational evidence, NOT proof)'.

The survivor reader reads m8_research_notes ONLY — it NEVER touches the Lean outcomes table (m8_conjecture_outcomes / OUTCOMES_TABLE). A dedicated test asserts the getSurvivorTemplateStats segment does not reference OUTCOMES_TABLE. So survivor evidence can never be laundered into the Lean-proven set.

No verification_state is written; nothing mints 'proven'. The block STEERS narration only (same mechanism as B112). The loop still invokes NO LLM (the survivor reads are pure Supabase; aggregation is pure CPU).

Additive + fail-safe: empty/unreachable table -> getSurvivorTemplateStats returns [] -> buildSurvivorBlock returns '' -> packet byte-identical to a no-evidence run. Silent until a template clears the productivity gate (default 3 distinct survivors).
Build-112 Lean-PROVEN lane + the verify phase (Build-B/110/111) are UNTOUCHED — confirmed by regression tests.
gate_design: A structural TEMPLATE earns the evidence hint only after it has produced >= M8_SURVIVOR_MIN_COUNT (default 3) DISTINCT surviving statements; the top SURVIVOR_TEMPLATE_LIMIT (5) by productivity are surfaced, ranked count-desc / maxBound-desc / name-asc. Distinct-statement counting (not raw rows) prevents over-counting a single survivor re-persisted across nightly runs. Mirrors B112's conservative N-gate philosophy, but on FREE survivor evidence instead of Lean proofs. Unlike B112 (live earned_patterns:0 -> silent), this lane is NON-empty on current live data (5 templates earn) — so the engine actually learns for free today.
schema_decision: NO DB schema change. Aggregation is READ-ONLY over existing columns (m8_research_notes.metadata JSONB). Telemetry is stamped into the EXISTING m8_loop_runs.metadata JSONB (designated for 'loop/gen/novelty versions' per its migration comment) — same no-migration path Build-112 used. STOP-and-ask schema gate NOT triggered.
files: lib/conjecture-gen.js (runConjectureGenWithFeedback: reads getSurvivorTemplateStats; prepends buildSurvivorBlock(survivorTemplates) BELOW the Lean-proven block + ABOVE avoid; returns survivorTemplates; early-return carries survivorTemplates: []; B112/B99/B92 calls all KEPT so regressions stay green; leading comment updated to VERIFIED / COMPUTATIONAL EVIDENCE / AVOID order)

lib/loop.js (runObservePhase ONLY: stamps learn.survivor_templates/survivor_min_count/survivor_template_tags into row.metadata; l5_m3 log adds survivorTplEarned; step-2 header comment updated. runVerifyPhase UNTOUCHED.)
tests/SURVIVOR-LEARNING_LIVE_TEST.md (NEW live-verify doc + live data snapshot; renamed from B113_LIVE_TEST.md to avoid a filename collision with the parallel B113 branch)
files_NOT_touched: lib/conjecture-memory.js Lean-proven path (recordOutcome/getEarnedSuccessPatterns/reconcileVerifiedOutcomes — unchanged), lib/loop.js runVerifyPhase, lib/proposer-feedback.js, lib/memory-graph.js, lib/notebook.js, lib/orchestrator.js
shared docs (NEXT_SESSION_BRIEF.md, m8_mind_2026.html, .claude/) — left for the session-close owner

tests.survivor-learning-verify.ps1: 50/50 PASS (8/8 core: parseTestedToBound; aggregate distinct-dedup+rank+maxBound; aggregate skips junk; gate keep>=3+cap5; LIVE-DATA shape -> exact top-5 earned + B_nu_geo dropped; survivorMinCount env/default; buildSurvivorBlock([]) -> ''; honesty wall: evidence-not-proof wording + [tags] + no proof claim. + 42 wiring/honesty incl. reader reads NOTES never OUTCOMES table, packet order VERIFIED/EVIDENCE/AVOID, loop telemetry stamped)
tests.node: absent on host -> PS-5.1 mirror + static review per repo convention; the integrated regions of all 3 lib files were statically reviewed for syntax.

live_verify_pending: After Muhammad merges + deploys: trigger /api/cron-explore, then check m8_loop_runs newest row metadata.learn.survivor_templates (expect ~5) + survivor_template_tags, and confirm the generator packet shows the COMPUTATIONAL EVIDENCE block labeled evidence-not-proof and SEPARATE from the Lean VERIFIED block. Full steps in tests/SURVIVOR-LEARNING_LIVE_TEST.md.
parallel_build_collision: HEADS-UP for the merge: a PARALLEL session shipped a DIFFERENT 'Build-113' on branch feat/b113-outcome-aware-gen (commit e3ecbf0, report reports/build-113-done.json). The two are COMPLEMENTARY, not duplicates: theirs steers the PURE mined cohort by down-weighting template regions that already carry an earned-verified/sorry Lean OUTCOME (and bumps GEN_VERSION 2->3); mine adds a SEPARATE free survivor-EVIDENCE PREFER block from m8_research_notes (no Lean, no GEN_VERSION change). MERGE-WATCH: both edit runConjectureGenWithFeedback (conjecture-gen.js) and runObservePhase telemetry (loop.js) -> expect a textual conflict; resolve by KEEPING BOTH (build their feedbackProfile AND read survivor stats + prepend the evidence block; merge both metadata.learn stamps). Filename collision already avoided: my live-test doc was renamed B113_LIVE_TEST.md -> SURVIVOR-LEARNING_LIVE_TEST.md; my report is survivor-learning-done.json (theirs is build-113-done.json). Suggest renumbering one to B114 when merging to disambiguate.
deploy: NOT deployed. Branch feat/survivor-learning pushed. Muhammad merges (he deploys). Kill/tune via env M8_SURVIVOR_MIN_COUNT (no redeploy needed).
